comments.author: @alelawr
comments.text: It’s a great film, but you keep saying "Nazis" and are afraid to say GERMANS—yet the Nazis were Germans who invaded Poland, occupied it, and committed all those atrocities there!   Auschwitz—it was not "National Socialists," but GERMANS from Nazi Germany who built this camp, and it was GERMANS who perpetrated the Holocaust on the soil of occupied Poland (1939–1945)! Originally  It was built for the POLISH "political" prisoners (including POLISH children and women) who were murdered there and featured the infamous "Arbeit macht frei" - in German language ("Work sets you free") wrought-iron sign at the entrance.  While the very first transport to Auschwitz concentration camp arrived on June 14, 1940, those individuals were POLISH "political"  prisoners. The first  transport of Jewish prisoners arrived on March 26, 1942......    KL Auschwitz was the largest of the German Nazi concentration camps and extermination centers. Over 1.1 million men, women and children lost their lives here.

comments.author: @PaulMikolasuk-ue6gq
comments.text: I have worked my whole life towards something, it has been a challenge, of many,many, trials  and tribulations,and I wouldn't trade, any of it for anything offered, some would say you have lived a good life, I would say it, isn't over I've seen good, I've seen bad, but the most amazing thing to me is the difference between them, and how they compliment one another,especially when one must make the right decision for the good of all concerned,there are truly amazing people,at the same time,there are some really sorry decisions, that just can't be forgiven, the world can be awesome either way,and at times I'm sorry I must decide for myself given the hole picture.

comments.author: @PaulMikolasuk-ue6gq
comments.text: I will leave my native land,and return to the land of my father's, father, at the end of my time, and try to find deeper meanings,of my existence,that is what is left to me, in my understanding,of what it all means to have been here, and until I find this to my satisfaction, nothing will do,some will understand this,but only those that have been tested.
